personal.name: Alexeis Vladimir Carrillo Pinaya
personal.title: Software Architect & Senior Full-Stack Developer
personal.tagline: Event-driven architectures at scale (gRPC · MQTT · Kafka) with an edge in on-premise AI.
personal.summary: Systems Engineer, developer and solutions architect with over 15 years building software. I work at the intersection of solid backend engineering (NestJS, Quarkus, Kubernetes) and real-world AI integration: I design scalable, event-driven systems, build intelligent agents with LLMs, and automate complex processes with a mindset focused on the user, the data and strategic value. From Power BI dashboards to secure hybrid architectures for banking and government, I love solving big problems with elegant solutions. I lead teams through service: people first, fostering innovation and building trust. Always in beta: learning, connecting and building.

highlights.title: Distributed architecture
highlights.description: Design of event-driven microservices with gRPC, MQTT and Kafka for high-concurrency systems.

highlights.title: Servant leadership
highlights.description: I put the team first: I foster innovation, give constant feedback and build trust — even with difficult profiles. I protect and back my people, which earns loyal teams that grow and give their best.

highlights.title: On-premise AI
highlights.description: Integration of local LLMs (Ollama, Llama.cpp) with RAG and embeddings for automation without exposing sensitive data.

description: Leading the development of a B2B travel-insurance system for a major Bolivian tourism company

Technology research and innovation for the tax system
Hybrid development and software architecture tasks
Led the development of the tax system's applications
Web application development with Java and PrimeFaces, plus web services
Mobile development with Ionic for system components
Instructor of Angular, NodeJS and MongoDB at COGNOS
University lecturer in JavaScript, Angular, MongoDB and NodeJS at UPB
Development of Android mobile applications for banking
Contactless payment solutions and regulatory compliance (FATCA)
Banking consulting and Android mobile development (mobile banking agents)

education.ongoing: Master's in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning & Data Science (Version II) — in progress

projects.name: B2B System — Travel Insurance
projects.description: I currently lead the development of this B2B travel-insurance platform for a major Bolivian tourism company. NestJS + ReactJS stack, with AI applied in the development process.

projects.name: Tu Municipio 24/7
projects.description: I led the team and designed the event-driven architecture (gRPC, MQTT) of this tax platform to check municipal debts and payments via bank QR. 100k+ downloads.

projects.name: Administrative Information System (SIA)
projects.description: I led the project and defined the entire stack (NestJS, Angular) and architecture. An HR system for staff control, vacations and records, with gRPC communication between services and reusable Angular libraries.

projects.name: Microservices + Kafka Ecosystem
projects.description: A microservices ecosystem with Spring Boot, Kafka, Avro and Schema Registry, with a shared library and email notifications.

projects.name: Oficina Virtual
projects.description: Mobile app to carry out paperwork and validate documents remotely.

projects.name: Ollama Client MCP
projects.description: An Ollama client implemented as an MCP server, to integrate local language models into workflows.

projects.name: GetPet
projects.description: A platform to find lost pets combining publishing and QR code scanning.

projects.name: Payments System — Sindicato Litoral
projects.description: I led the project: a payments system for Sindicato Litoral (La Paz, Bolivia) built with NestJS and Angular, deployed on AWS (EC2).

projects.name: Inventory System
projects.description: Custom inventory system developed for an independent Bolivian exporter.
